Polecat-finds-obstacle → vision-doc-amended-FIRST. Mayor adopted vision-first verification mayor-side. Working empirically — every Prong polecat in the past 24h ran vision-first verification cleanly; no drift detected by mayor or subagent.
- **V1+V2 enforcement is the methodological-hope test.** "Algebraic objects" and "computable Q" must be genuine, not relabeled. Polecats explicit-state which V-pillar each step realises; mayor flags drift; PM verifies. Held in mg-63df (Family B, full closed-form Q_closed_sp recursion), mg-2715 (Family D, M_{q+1} closed-form delivered + Wall Lemma §3.2 honest diagnosis), mg-3b16 (Family C, Ehrhart order-polynomial fifth engine + 4/11 seed extracted exactly).

## OneThird Algebraic Program — the active arc

### Reference bars (in ascending order of Q)

| Bar | Family | Status | Witness |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1/3 ≈ 0.33333 | global textbook tight | settled theorem | `point ‖ (y<z)` (width-≤2 gadget) |
| 14/39 ≈ 0.35897 | **general width-3, n=7,8 plateau** | **empirical** (mg-3b16) | identified in Family C order-polytope sweep, n=7 |
| 4/11 ≈ 0.36364 | graded-3-level seed | empirical + closed-form | order polytope of (1,3,1) shape, e(P)=11 (mg-2715 → mg-3b16) |
| 27/70 ≈ 0.38571 | skew Family A | empirical (SKEW-ARTIFACT) | (4,4,2)/(2,0,0), n=8 (mg-106e); does NOT extend (mg-63df) |
| 8/21 ≈ 0.38095 | **width-exactly-3 SP** | **analytic theorem (SHARP)** | T*=G⊕G‖point, G=point‖2-chain (mg-7009) |
| 2/5 = 0.40000 | **genuine Family D** | **empirical floor** | P2L3 incidence poset (mg-2715) |
| 1/2 = 0.50000 | M_{q+1} = rank-2 subspace lattice F_q^2 | **closed-form theorem** | every prime-power q (mg-2715) |

**Open question:** does Q descend further below 14/39 at higher n, or does 14/39 plateau (n=7,8 already plateau at 14/39 across 643,236 width-3 shapes scanned)? Prong 3C is the analytic follow-up.

### Analytic theorems (three)

1. **Prong 1 (mg-9597) — central-symmetry pair identity + signed-gap wall.** For self-dual 3-row skew P and box rotation ρ(i,j) = (4−i, C+1−j): Pr[x<y] = Pr[ρy<ρx] for every incomparable pair (explicit involution Φσ(c) = n+1−σ(ρc); bijection of linear extensions). Signed-gap σ(ρx)−σ(x) is Φ-invariant on ρ-swapped pairs → symmetry pins no balance on the Q-realiser. Outcome 4 clean negative diagnosis; §5 missing input = forced-relation skew-SYT ratio bound (BFT 1995 ≈ 0.2764 below 1/3; would attack the open width-3 conjecture itself); parked.
2. **Prong 3A (mg-7009) — width-exactly-3 SP analytic floor.** Q ≥ 8/21 for ALL width-exactly-3 SP posets, ALL n, SHARP at T*. SP series-convolution induction; binding case Lemma G ({1,2} with thin point) fully hand-proved; two non-binding strict-margin lemmas (φ4, T) exhaustively verified (Prong 3B-α park). Constant decomposition 8/21 = 1/2 − 5/42 where 5/3 = inter-gadget expected-rank gap. V2 fully leveraged (Q_closed_sp drove the proof end-to-end, zero references to Q_via_dp or order_ideal).
3. **Prong 3B-β (mg-2715) — Wall Lemma §3.2 + closed-form Q on M_{q+1}.** Any 2-level point-line incidence poset with width-3 forces ≤3 points AND ≤3 lines; subspace lattices L_n(q) have width q+1 (width-3 only at q=2, the 5-element diamond); PG(2,q)/PG(3,q)/GQ never width-3. So no q-parameterised width-3 sweep exists in Family D — the methodological-hope wall is proven, not waved. Also: Q(M_{q+1}) = 1/2 for every prime power q (atom-swap automorphism), closed form.

### Proven NEW-WALLs (two)

1. **Family D Wall Lemma §3.2 (mg-2715).** As above.
2. **Family C Wall Lemma §3.2 (mg-3b16).** Ehrhart dilation parameter t is Q-invariant (Q is a volume ratio vol(O(P)∩{f(x)≤f(y)})/vol(O(P)) = e(P+x<y)/e(P), scale-invariant under t-dilation of O(P)). Family C is not an independent source of posets — O(·) is a functor poset → polytope (Stanley) and a faithful re-encoding of the linear-extension combinatorics. The closed-form Q lives in the **combinatorial type** (n1,n2,n3,covering structure), not in dilation. So Family C is the **closed-form volume engine** that reveals the 4/11 seed and the 14/39 below-seed descent; the dilation-sweep ambition is proven structurally impossible. This pattern (proven wall + retained productive instrument) is now the family-survey norm.

### Sequence

- AP-0 (mg-98a6): ribbon hypothesis falsified; stacked-near-equal-row argmins discovered.
- AP-1a (mg-746f): (3k+1,3k,3k)/(3k,0,0) ray FALSIFIED; redirected to small-μ near-equal-λ.
- AP-1b' (mg-106e): central-symmetry rule DISCOVERED (μ₃=0, λ₃=λ₁−μ₁, μ₂=λ₁−λ₂; 3-parameter centrally-symmetric self-dual family); 27/70 TRIPLY-CONFIRMED as Family A empirical floor at n=8, cap-stable across n∈[7,24] over 14,267 self-dual shapes. (Recovery from mg-b1eb three-time rate-limit wedge via Option D shelve+rename+reword fingerprint-bust — 85 min start-to-merge.)
- AP-2 Prong 1 (mg-9597): ANALYTIC-PARTIAL Outcome 4 — Theorem 1 + Lemma 2 wall.
- AP-2 Prong 2 (mg-63df): SKEW-ARTIFACT — 27/70 does NOT extend to width-3 SP (Family B min = 8/21 ≈ 0.380952 < 27/70 by 1/210). V1+V2 GENUINE.
- AP-2 Prong 3A (mg-7009): ANALYTIC-STRONG — Q ≥ 8/21 PROVED, SHARP at T*. First analytic-strong of the arc.
- AP-2 Prong 3B-β (mg-2715): BROADER-FLOOR-CANDIDATE + Wall Lemma §3.2. Family D ≥ 2/5; 4/11 seed surfaced from boundary probe (generic graded 3-level, NOT faithful Family D).
- AP-2 Prong 3B-γ (mg-3b16): **NEW-TERRITORY-BELOW-4/11** — Q = 14/39 at width-3 n=7,8 plateau across 643,236 shapes. 4/11 seed extracted concretely as (1,3,1) order polytope. Family C NEW-WALL on Ehrhart dilation. §8.2 STRICT non-fire (no Q ≤ 1/3 anywhere).

### Live / queued tickets (Algebraic Program)

- **In flight:** none (mg-3b16 just merged).
- **Next to file:** AP-2 Prong 3C — analytic question on the 14/39 plateau (does Q descend further at higher n, or does 14/39 plateau as the next floor?). Polecat-sized. Brief draft pending mayor's mg-3b16 verdict relay (expected within ~30 min).
- **Parked:** Prong 3B-α (formal closure of Prong 3A's φ4 + Lemma T non-binding lemmas — strict-margin 2/5, cannot affect 8/21 headline). Family A Missing Lemma (forced-relation skew-SYT ratio bound from Prong 1 §5 — special case of open width-3 conjecture, bigger than polecat-sized).

### Trajectory

- The Algebraic Program is doing what it was designed to do: cheap parameter-space mapping + structural exploration where it pays. Five polecat merges in 12 hours, three analytic theorems, two proven walls, and a new lowest-known-Q-above-1/3. The methodological hope (V2 closed-form Q from algebraic parameters) is empirically validated on two families end-to-end (B + C).
- The 14/39 surfacing is the most-actionable single finding: it puts the live counterexample-search zone in (1/3, 14/39], with the working hypothesis being that 1/3 is asymptotically the right floor and 14/39 is either the next plateau or a stepping stone downward.

## OneThird (paper / Cheeger arc) — STRATEGY-INDICTED (unchanged from 2026-05-23)

Milestone 1 was "a full gap-free width-3 1/3-2/3 proof." The Cheeger / cut-and-window local-to-bulk strategy is indicted in the deep-rich-irreducible-twin-free regime where minimal counterexamples live (3 fatal math gaps + Steps 1↔5 circular + undischarged Hypothesis A + systematic area-vs-perimeter blind spot). Three options NOW Daniel's, escalated 2026-05-23T06:30Z:

(i) FINISH THE ACTUAL PROOF — R-A + R-BC parallel multi-month.
(ii) FINISH A CONDITIONAL PROOF — "width-3 1/3-2/3 holds modulo [explicit assumption]". Weeks.
(iii) ABANDON the Cheeger framework entirely.

**PM recommendation:** (ii) NOW + (i) QUEUED. Honors finish-the-proof in the most-honest available form (weeks, not years), produces a publishable artifact, queues (i) as a separately-named future arc.

The Algebraic Program (Daniel 2026-05-28) is effectively a **fourth option** — pivot to algebraic exploration. Non-exclusive with (ii) and informative for (iii). The four AP-2 findings in this sweep don't resolve the Cheeger-arc decision but do materially advance the "is there a width-3 counterexample anywhere" question (no, in everything surveyed; the live zone is narrowing toward 1/3).

## Frankl arc — vision restated; vision-step-3 achievable; vision-step-4 binding on CANONICITY (unchanged from 2026-05-23)

Daniel restated the original vision verbatim 2026-05-23T04:17Z: "take minimal counterexample, show by inclusion exclusion it induces non trivial cohomology in the category of families. Separately prove some result about the cohomology of the category to achieve a contradiction."

**Net of 2026-05-23 overnight work:**
- mg-e466 (first genuine attempt) — vision-matched. Mechanism produces non-trivial sgn classes for ~33-39% of GENERIC families at n=3/4. On CE-shape F*: 100% zero at n=3, 86% at n=4 (CE-shape transposition-symmetric structure inherits to F-natural cochains).
- 3 bypass probes (mg-e1e2 / mg-1b24 / mg-3978): vision-step-3 IS achievable (π-ordering route 12/12 perfect; F-natural sgn-twist 12/12 + 100% n=4). BUT vision-step-4 binding: g_F ≥ 1 > 0 proved for any Frankl counterexample → contradictive layer provably degenerate from sgn-only host. Only path with non-degenerate potential: π-ordering, requiring canonicity ruling.

**Live Daniel ask:**
- STRICT canonicity → π-ordering disallowed → Frankl stays RED.
- RELAXED canonicity → π-ordering live; vision-step-4 becomes uniform-in-π vanishing theorem.

**Triage:** mg-4052 (enriched-host follow-on, sgn-twist rescue) auto-held pending canonicity ruling.
